    ProjectTD 1 API

    Packages
    Package
    Description
    application
    Provides the core bootstrap and view management for the application.
    bullets
    Projectile System Package * This package implements the core mechanics for all projectile entities within the game.
    card
    Card System and Summoning Framework * This package defines the core infrastructure for the card-based mechanics within the game.
    enemy
    Enemy and Path-finding Logic System This package contains the core classes responsible for enemy behavior, movement, and state management.
    input
    Input Management and Event Handling System This package provides a centralized utility for processing keyboard and mouse events within the JavaFX environment.
    Interface
    Game Interfaces and Behavior Contracts This package defines the core interfaces and behavioral contracts that govern the interactions between different game entities.
    logic
    Game Logic and State Management * This package contains the core engine logic responsible for managing the game's internal state, including wave progression, entity spawning, and combat coordination.
    path
    Provides the spatial infrastructure and geometric logic for entity navigation.
    spell
    Provides the framework and concrete implementations for the game's active ability system.
    tower
    Provides the core logic and specialized implementations for defensive structures.
    view
    Provides the graphical user interface (GUI) components and visual rendering systems.
